description: Design a model rocket named 'Phoenix Scout' in OpenRocket with the following configuration: an ogive nose cone (150 mm length, 41.6 mm base diameter), a payload body tube (120 mm length, 41.6 mm outer diameter) containing a 610 mm diameter parachute set to deploy at apogee, and a main body tube (300 mm length, 41.6 mm outer diameter). The main body tube must include a three-fin trapezoidal set (100 mm root chord, 40 mm tip chord, 65 mm height), a 40 mm launch lug, and an inner tube (75 mm length, 25 mm outer diameter, 24 mm inner diameter) designated as a motor mount. Configure the rocket with an Estes C6-5 motor, run a successful flight simulation, and save the design to ~/Documents/rockets/phoenix_scout.ork.
